308 INST - Information Studies

INST406 Cross Disciplinary Design Communication Lab (3 Credits) Explores the world of communicating the ideas behind the things we make. In design, the product tends to be the prize: a manifestation of experience, sensibilities, and observations. But products do not always articulate a complete picture of what they are and how they came to

be. Communication-speaking, writing, depicting, presenting to various audiences-—is an under-leveraged component of design, connecting
